points.goal: Identify the post-subpoena personal phone preservation failure, its lost source status, affected categories, and required action.
Identify the responsive R09 dealer complaint email miscoded nonresponsive and not produced, including the QC reference and recode-and-produce action.
Calculate the R11 privilege-log gap as 1770 unlogged withheld documents and classify the protocol status as noncompliant.
Identify the uncollected board SharePoint site as a collection gap affecting R07, R08, and R09 with a collect-source action.
Provide the correct non-complete category statuses and source references for R07, R08, R09, R11, and R15.
Provide the correct rollup metrics and mark the first rolling production as not ready.
Provide the required prioritized remediation action set with correct action types, owners, targets, and category impacts.
